calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Michael K. Sipes, Esq., appearing for California Service Bureau, Inc.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Maire C. Dwan.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Rosemary Pereira sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1. Group exhibit Assignment from Seaton Medical Center. Admitted in Evidence.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff California Service Bureau and against Defendant Maire Dwan as follows:
Principal $6,831.88
Pre-Judgment Interest $1,791.26
Attorney's Fees $800.00
Costs $266.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $9,689.14
Court ordered Exhibit 1 returned to counsel for the care and custody of the court.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Set For Trial On Oct-07-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
